name: Pluggable Authentication Modules Modification
description: Detects modification of PAM configuration files for credential interception or backdoor
query:
// Detect PAM configuration modification
// Trigger on writes to PAM configuration files
events from endpoint
where event_type = "file_write"
  and file_path matches "(?i)/etc/pam\.d/|/lib.*/security/pam_"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
